title: Agentic Workspace Local Mixed-Agent Override
description: Machine-local override schema for invocation preferences, delegation capabilities, safety posture, and local memory.

cli_invoke.description: Cli invoke text value used by this contract.

workspace.description: Local workspace preferences that should not be checked into shared repo config.

supports_internal_delegation.description: Supports internal delegation true/false policy flag used by this contract.

strong_planner_available.description: Strong planner available true/false policy flag used by this contract.

cheap_bounded_executor_available.description: Cheap bounded executor available true/false policy flag used by this contract.

runtime.description: Capabilities of the current agent/runtime on this machine.

prefer_internal_delegation_when_availabl.description: Prefer internal delegation when available true/false policy flag used by this contract.

handoff.description: Local preferences for internal or external delegation handoff.

safe_to_auto_run_commands.description: Safe to auto run commands true/false policy flag used by this contract.

requires_human_verification_on_pr.description: Requires human verification on pr true/false policy flag used by this contract.

safety.description: Local safety limits for command execution and verification.

enabled.description: Enabled true/false policy flag used by this contract.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

local_memory.description: Machine-local memory opt-in and path configuration.

strength.description: Allowed strength value for routing or validation.

location.description: Allowed location value for routing or validation.

confidence.description: Confidence contract value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the task fit list.

task_fit.description: Ordered task fit entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the capability classes list.

capability_classes.description: Ordered capability classes entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the execution methods list.

execution_methods.description: Ordered execution methods entries used by this contract.

delegation_targets.description: Named local delegation targets available to this runtime.
